prompt: Create a computer graphics visual demonstrating object detection on a natural scene, inspired by the reference image's layout and style. Show an animal in water with an overlaid, incorrect bounding box and label.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics visual depicting a natural scene, inspired by the composition, subject, and lighting of image 1. The scene should feature a goose swimming on calm water. Overlay this visual with object detection elements: a vibrant green rectangular bounding box must be positioned in the lower-left corner of the image, enclosing only a small, empty area of the water. Directly above this green bounding box, display the word 'Car' in prominent, bright green text. The final image should clearly present a computer-generated render illustrating an incorrect object detection output.
objects: vibrant green rectangular bounding box in lower-left corner, enclosing empty water
the word 'Car' in prominent, bright green text, directly above the green bounding box
